requests.prompt: Chinese ink wash painting combined with low poly geometric faceted 3D art, children picture book illustration style, soft warm lighting. A warm cozy tree hollow interior at dusk, soft golden light fading through the entrance. Two small raven children sitting on a woven rug: GABABA (charcoal black feathers, round curious gold eyes, small cute beak) and GAYAYA (pure snow-white feathers all over, round gentle eyes, delicate small beak). They are looking at a picture book together. Warm peaceful atmosphere. No text, no letters, no words, no Chinese characters.
